summary: All implementation was already present: lib/summarize.sh has summarize_plan, summarize_review, summarize_tests, summarize_architect, summarize_artifact dispatcher, and summarize_ticket_artifacts covering all four artifact types; lib/planning.sh has planning_persist_review and planning_run_loop already calls it on approve. All 72 tests in tests/summarize.bats and tests/planning.bats pass.
